title: Overcoming Core Engineering Barriers in Humanoid Robotics Development
title_zh: 克服人形机器人开发中的核心工程障碍
abstract: A technical examination of the sensing, motion control, power, and thermal challenges facing humanoid robotics engineers — with component-level design strategies for real-world deployment.    What Attendees will Learn     Why motion control remains the hardest unsolved problem — Explore the modelling complexity, real-time feedback requirements, and sensor fusion demands of maintaining stable biped
abstract_zh: 对人形机器人工程师面临的传感、运动控制、动力和热管理挑战进行技术审视，并提供面向实际部署的组件级设计策略。与会者将了解：为何运动控制仍是最难解决的核心问题——探讨维持稳定双足行走所需的建模复杂性、实时反馈需求以及传感器融合要求。
tldr_zh: 剖析人形机器人运动控制等核心工程难题及组件级设计策略。
cover_zh: 双足行走为何这么难？｜人形机器人工程障碍全解析
